name: agent-pays-agent
description: An interactive pixel-art cartoon where two agents make a buy/sell paid over x402 and signed on a Ledger device.
comment:optionalDependencies: ethers is only needed for real Ledger signing (USE_REAL_SIGNER=true); it is loaded lazily and is optional so a failed/omitted install never breaks the simulated build or the Render deploy. Real signing talks to Speculos directly over HTTP APDU (no @ledgerhq packages). See docs/speculos.md.
